name: Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Large fresh shrimp, uncooked cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine melted margarine, oil, garlic, and pepper in a shallow heatproof casserole dish.
2. Add shrimp, and toss lightly to coat.
3. Spread shrimp in a single layer.
4. Broil shrimp 4 inches from the heat for 3-4 minutes.
5. Turn shrimp, and broil an additional 3-4 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley, and serve.
